description: An extendedLibrary version 1 artist query. An empty object requests the first page, in id order, with core fields only.

properties.description: Optional ArtistID3 fields to return in addition to id and name. Omitted or empty means core fields only.

sort.description: Ordered unique sort fields. If id is explicit it must be last; otherwise id ascending is appended.

cursor.description: An opaque forward-only continuation token returned by the same endpoint.
